name: Green Apple Sorbet (Sorbet De Pommes Vertes)
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound Granny Smith apples, unpeeled and cored, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sliced apples and fresh lemon juice in a medium bowl. Cover with plastic wrap and freeze overnight.
2. In a heavy saucepan, combine the water and sugar. Stir over medium heat until the sugar dissolves. Increase the heat and bring to a boil.
3. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
4. Puree the frozen apple slices and sugar syrup in a processor until the mixture is as smooth as possible.
5. Transfer the apple mixture to an ice cream maker and process according to the manufacturer's instructions.
6. Transfer the sorbet to a container and freeze. (Can be prepared up to 1 day ahead.)
